overall_correctness.description: Whether the patch is correct or contains issues.

overall_explanation.description: Reasoning for the correctness verdict (2-3 sentences).

overall_confidence_score.description: Confidence in the overall verdict (0.0 to 1.0).

findings.description: List of code review findings. Empty array if no issues found.

title.description: Short title summarizing the issue (max 80 characters).

body.description: Detailed explanation of the issue and suggested fix. Use markdown.

confidence_score.description: How confident you are this is a real issue (0.0 to 1.0).

code_location.description: Exact file and line range for this finding.

relative_file_path.description: Path to the file relative to the repository root.

line_range.description: Line range in the new version of the file.
